summary: Set 051 Session 3 of 4 - retired the superseded Set 050 Claude SessionStart hook in the VS Code extension (verdict V10; spec S3). Re-verified the premise before deleting: Set 053's summarize_drift IS imported and called in both ai_router/start_session.py and close_session.py, so retiring the Claude-only hook loses no drift coverage -- it removes a redundant, divergence-prone duplicate (its scanSchemaDrift JS duplicated summarize_drift, and its start_session invocation was a non-load-bearing Claude-only convenience under the portability rule). Deleted 4 files: scripts/claude-session-start-invoker.js, src/commands/installOrchestratorHookClaudeCode.ts (installer command + 'Copy manual setup' toast), ai_router/tests/test_invoker_schema_constant.py (dead JS-constant pin), and src/test/suite/claudeSessionStartInvoker.test.ts (Layer-2 suite that dynamic-imports the deleted JS -- spec-implied consequence, flagged for S4 verifier). Removed the package.json command contribution + the extension.ts import/safeRegister wiring (rewrote the stale Set-049 comment); bumped the Q7 watcher-allowlist line 154->153 for the one-line import shift; recompiled the dist bundle. Reconciled docs as historical pointing at the Set 053 lifecycle advisory: CLAUDE.md (v0.25.0 retirement note), ai-led-session-workflow.md, session-state-schema.md, cross-repo-migration-guard-notice.md (superseded banner + neutralized install step). Created docs/cross-repo-hook-retirement-notice.md (consumer/operator remediation; does NOT edit machine settings). Verification MANUAL (spec quality bar = no regressions; cross-provider verification scoped to S4): Python 1028 passed / 1 skipped (-1 = deleted pin test); TS tsc clean + test:unit 554 passing with only the 2 known pre-existing Set-026 scaffolding failures. The close_session gate run itself emitted the Set 053 drift advisory (live-mechanism confirmation). S3 invoked no router -- $0 routed; cumulative $0.0272/$10.

reason.specifics: S4 is the final session: reconcile ai_router/CHANGELOG.md + any docs still naming removed surfaces + CLAUDE.md (restructure the version walk for the new bump); dual version bumps -- PyPI dabbler-ai-router (S2 joiner/packaging removals) AND the VS Code Marketplace extension (S3 hook retirement) -- plus change-log.md; run cross-provider verification of the whole set (it must scrutinize the S2 V3/V4 deviations AND the S3 spec-implied deletion of claudeSessionStartInvoker.test.ts + the watcher-allowlist line bump); close-out; both publishes HELD for operator-initiated tag-push (PyPI v<X.Y.Z> + Marketplace vsix-v<X.Y.Z>). Same Claude/Opus orchestrator keeps continuity of the removal-arc context. NOTE: confirm VSCE_PAT freshness before the Marketplace tag-push (it expired during the 0.24.0 publish).
